chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 65 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 22.02.2024 Mr. Rakesh Kumar Dhalore, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- We have gone through the petition, it is not maintainable. Petitioner, and advocate, is seeking directions for conducting an enquiry against respondents for not completing the road from village Muhammad Hassan Brohi to village Usman Gahojo, Kandiaro, District Naushahro Feroze. Against which, being factual controversy, he has adequate remedy to approach the relevant forums. Petition is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
